system.description:
When you **_have captured a tremendous elemental force_** (like that from a storm or wildfire) and **_then_** **_channel it into the eddies of air or earth_**, pick 1 from the list below and roll +INT: **on a 10+**, it comes to pass; **on a 7-9**, it will come to pass if you choose to mark a consequence; **on a 6-**, mark a consequence and prepare for the worst.
- A potent storm or earthquake builds, unleashing itself within the next few hours.
- The weather for the next few weeks is abnormal, hotter or colder, wetter or dryer, windier or more still, per your desires (though nothing too extreme).
- The weather for the next few months is generally favorable; any steading in the area gains advantage to its next Seasons Change roll.

partial.value: it will come to pass if you choose to mark a consequence

failure.value: mark a consequence and prepare for the worst.
